Part.Source:
&DataLimite = ServerDate() - 15 &Ontem = serverdate() - 1 &Directory.Source = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaNFerro For &File In &Directory.GetFiles() If &File.GetLastModified() < &DataLimite &File.Delete() EndIf EndFor
&Directory.Source = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaNFretorno For &File In &Directory.GetFiles() If &File.GetLastModified() < &DataLimite &File.Delete() EndIf EndFor
&Directory.Source = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaNFpdf For &File In &Directory.GetFiles() If &File.GetLastModified() < &DataLimite &File.Delete() EndIf EndFor
&Directory.Source = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaNFpdf If not &Directory.Exists() &Directory.Create() EndIF
&Directory.Source = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioCobFis For &File In &Directory.GetFiles() If &File.GetLastModified() < &DataLimite &File.Delete() EndIf EndFor
&Directory.Source = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioCobFis If not &Directory.Exists() &Directory.Create() EndIF
&Directory.Source = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempFis For &File In &Directory.GetFiles() If &File.GetLastModified() < &Ontem &File.Delete() EndIf EndFor
&Directory.Source = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempFis If not &Directory.Exists() &Directory.Create() EndIF
&Directory.Source = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempFis + 'whatsapp\boletos\' If not &Directory.Exists() &Directory.Create() EndIF
&Directory.Source = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempFis + 'whatsapp\boletos\' For &File In &Directory.GetFiles() If &File.GetLastModified() < &Ontem &File.Delete() EndIf EndFor
&Directory.Source = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempFis For &Directory in &Directory.GetDirectories() If &Directory.GetName() <> 'CTE' and &Directory.GetName() <> 'whatsapp' &Directory.Delete() EndIf EndFor
&Directory.Source = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempFis+'CTE' If not &Directory.Exists() &Directory.Create() EndIF
&Directory.Source = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioImagensProduto+'tmp\' For &File In &Directory.GetFiles() &File.Delete() EndFor
&Directory.Source = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioImagensProduto+'tmp\' If not &Directory.Exists() &Directory.Create() EndIF
